queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'PyCharm Community Edition %' AND publisher = 'JetBrains s.r.o.';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'PyCharm Community Edition %' AND publisher = 'JetBrains s.r.o.' AND version_compare(version, '2025.2.6.1') < 0);
